items.title: Trump pardons 5 former NFL players for crimes from perjury to drug trafficking
items.description: President Donald Trump has pardoned five former NFL players for crimes that include perjury, counterfeiting and drug trafficking

items.title: Brazilian au pair faces sentencing in scheme to kill lover's wife and another man
items.description: A Brazilian au pair is facing a judge after confessing to scheming with her lover to kill his wife and another man
